posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local #3 (Rochester)
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online during the recruitment period, print the application, and submit it in person at the BAC LU #3 JATC office/drop box or mail it in. If you cannot print it, call to have one mailed to you.
posting.applicationMailingAddress: BAC LU #3 JATC, 33 Saginaw Drive, Rochester, NY 14623
posting.applicationHours: If unable to print the online application, call (585) 641-0750 between 8:00AM-4:00PM Monday-Friday, excluding legal holidays, to have an application mailed to you.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old at the time of enrollment.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a physical and a drug test after the offer of employment, at the sponsor's expense, and must submit to random drug testing during the apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old at the time of enrollment.

Must sign an affidavit stating that they are physically able to perform the work required of the trade, including standing and kneeling for prolonged periods; climbing and working off lifts, ladders, and scaffolds; repetitive bending and stooping; having near vision to read blueprints and depth perception to verify alignment; using a plumb bob to verify trueness of alignment; lifting, carrying, and positioning materials weighing up to 40 pounds; possible exposure to loud noises and respiratory irritants such as dust and chemicals; and working in confined spaces and outside in all weather conditions.
Must pass a physical and a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after the offer of employment.
Must also submit to random drug testing which may be administered at any time during the apprenticeship.
Must provide their own hand tools as appropriate for the trade; estimated cost of tools is approximately $100-$500 depending on the trade.
Must provide proof of employment authorization to work in the United States at the time of offer.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, physically able to do the work, and able to pass sponsor-paid physical and drug testing. They must provide their own hand tools, show U.S. work authorization, and have reliable transportation.
posting.contactName: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #3 (Rochester)
posting.contactSummary: Contact the JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #3 (Rochester) at (585) 641-0750 for further information.
